signin.title: Welcome to Alwan Invite
signin.subtitle: Start managing your digital invitations easily and efficiently.
signin.termsPrefix: By signing in, you agree to our

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noInvitations: No invitations yet. Create your first one!

invitation.title: Invitation

create.title: Create New Invitation
create.subtitle: Fill in the details to create your digital wedding invitation

invitation.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this invitation? This action cannot be undone.

placeholders.title: e.g., Sarah & John Wedding
placeholders.additionalInfo: e.g., Daughter of Mr. & Mrs. Smith
placeholders.wishAutoReply: e.g., Thank you so much for your kind wishes!

helpers.slug: This will be your invitation URL: alwaninvite.com/invite/{slug}
helpers.giftsOptional: Gift information is optional. You can add bank accounts, e-wallets, or crypto addresses.
helpers.liveStream: Optional: Add live streaming details if you plan to broadcast your event online.
helpers.audio: Optional: Add background music to your invitation page.
helpers.confettiOnWish: Show a confetti animation when a guest submits their wish
helpers.confettiEmoji: Customize the emoji used in the confetti animation (max 2). Leave empty to use the default.
helpers.wishAutoReply: Optional: This message will be shown to guests after they submit their wish.
helpers.sundayAsAhad: When enabled, Sunday will be displayed as 'Ahad' on your invitation

empty.noGifts: No gifts added yet. Click 'Add Gift' to add gift information.
empty.title: No Invitations Yet
empty.subtitle: Start creating your first wedding invitation
empty.uploadAudioHint: Upload audio files from the Media page

slug.min: Slug must be at least 3 characters
slug.format: Slug can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens

title.min: Title must be at least 3 characters

name.min: Name must be at least 2 characters

fullname.min: Full name must be at least 3 characters
fullname.max: Full name must not exceed 100 characters

accountName.min: Account name must be at least 3 characters
accountName.max: Account name must not exceed 100 characters

accountNumber.min: Account number must be at least 3 characters
accountNumber.max: Account number must not exceed 50 characters

events.min: At least one event is required

error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
error.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.

media.title: Media Library
media.subtitle: Manage your audio files
media.systemAudioDescription: Browse and preview audio tracks provided by the app
media.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this audio file?
media.noWeddingFound: No wedding found. Please create an invitation first.

empty.title: No Audio Files
empty.subtitle: Upload your first audio file to get started

homepage.heroSubtitle: Create stunning digital invitations in minutes. Share with a link, track RSVPs, and make every occasion unforgettable.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: From design to delivery, Alwan Invite handles every part of the invitation process.

templates.title: Beautiful Templates
templates.description: Choose from dozens of professionally designed invitation templates for every occasion.

guests.title: Guest Management
guests.description: Track RSVPs, manage your guest list, and send reminders all from one place.

analytics.title: Real-time Analytics
analytics.description: See who opened your invitation, RSVP rates, and engagement metrics instantly.

media.title: Media Library
media.description: Upload photos, videos and memories to make your invitation truly personal.

shareable.title: Shareable Links
shareable.description: Share your invitation with a single link via WhatsApp, email, or social media.

secure.title: Secure & Private
secure.description: Your data is protected. Control who can view your invitation with privacy settings.

howItWorks.title: Up and running in minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: Creating and sharing your invitation has never been this simple.

choose.title: Choose a Template
choose.description: Pick from our curated collection of elegant designs.

customize.title: Customize Details
customize.description: Add your event info, photos, and personal touches.

share.title: Share & Track
share.description: Send your link and watch RSVPs roll in real-time.

cta.title: Ready to create your invitation?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of people who use Alwan Invite to celebrate life's most important moments.

wishes.title: Wishes & RSVP
wishes.subtitle: Manage guest wishes and attendance responses
wishes.searchPlaceholder: Search by guest name or message...
wishes.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this wish?
wishes.confirmDeleteSelected: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected wish(es)? This action cannot be undone.
wishes.addGuestsSubtitle: Pre-fill your guest list. Each guest will start with no attendance status until they open the invitation.
wishes.duplicateInList: Appears more than once in your list
wishes.duplicateWarning: Please remove or rename the duplicate name(s) below before saving. Each guest must have a unique name — try adding a distinguishing detail (e.g. nickname, initial, or relation).

waTemplate.title: Set Up Your WhatsApp Invitation Message
waTemplate.selectWeddingHint: Choose a wedding first, then you can write the message you want to send to your guests via WhatsApp.
waTemplate.insertVariable: Tap to add into your message:
waTemplate.variableHint: These will be filled in automatically for each guest when you copy the message.
waTemplate.messagePlaceholder: Write your WhatsApp invitation message here...
waTemplate.preview: How it will look — example guest: Ahmad Fauzi
waTemplate.prebuiltHint: Pick one below to fill in the message — you can still edit it afterwards.

empty.title: No Wishes Yet
empty.subtitle: Guest wishes and RSVP responses will appear here
